rationale: Review 1 identifies a real attribution tension grounded in the diff: the PR's own module docstring claims adaptation from Atlas/Meta, yet the copyright header asserts Lean FRO LLC ownership without acknowledging the upstream source; acting on Review 1 resolves this explicit inconsistency. However, confidence is low because Review 2's observation that the implementations are trivially tautological (h_transform, banach_steinhaus h) is also diff-grounded and weakens the case that any copyright-meaningful adaptation occurred.
